content: async-graphql 7.2.1 query-only schema: Schema::build(Query, EmptyMutation, EmptySubscription).data(arc_state).finish(). Data injection via .data(T) on SchemaBuilder, retrieval via ctx.data::<T>() in resolvers. #[Object] macro on impl blocks for resolvers with ctx: &Context<'_> param. #[SimpleObject] derive for plain struct field exposure. #[InputObject] derive for args. Vec<Vec<String>> maps to [[String]] in GraphQL automatically. Error::new(msg) for client errors; extend_with for extensions. EmptyMutation/EmptySubscription give a query-only schema structurally incapable of mutations.
